summary: Iteration 19 - Priority System Testing Complete. All backend and frontend features verified: Backend returns priority/priority_label on all practice endpoints, practices sorted by priority (urgent first), dashboard stats include priority fields. Frontend shows 'Urgente Ora' section (3 urgent practices), 'In Attesa di Approvazione' section (1 practice), PRIORITA column in tables with colored badges (urgent=red, high=amber, normal=blue, low=gray), practice detail shows priority badge in header.
critical_code_review_comments: evaluate_practice_priority() correctly calculates priority based on deadline, status, risk, and stall time
Priority recalculated on create, status change, approval, and orchestration
PRIORITY_LEVELS correctly maps to Italian labels (Urgente, Alta, Normale, Bassa)
Dashboard smart sections correctly filter by priority and status
Priority badges use correct color scheme (red/amber/sky/gray)
Practices sorted by priority_order then created_at
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested the automatic intelligent priority system. All features verified: (1) Backend: GET /api/practices returns priority and priority_label for each practice, sorted by priority (urgent first). GET /api/practices/{id} returns priority fields. GET /api/dashboard/stats returns recent_practices and critical_practices with priority fields, both sorted by priority. Priority labels are in Italian (Urgente, Alta, Normale, Bassa). (2) Frontend Dashboard: 'Urgente Ora' section shows 3 urgent practices with red badges. 'In Attesa di Approvazione' section shows 1 practice with high priority. 'Tutte le Pratiche' table has PRIORITA column with colored badges. 17 total priority badges on dashboard. (3) Frontend Practices List: PRIORITA column in table header, priority badges with correct colors, practices sorted by priority. (4) Frontend Practice Detail: Priority badge 'Urgente' visible in header next to status badge. All priority badge colors correct: urgent=red-50/red-700, high=amber-50/amber-700, normal=sky-50/sky-700, low=gray-50/gray-500.

details: GET /api/practices returns priority and priority_label for each practice
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns recent_practices with priority fields
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns critical_practices with priority fields
Priority labels are in Italian (Urgente, Alta, Normale, Bassa)
Practices sorted by priority (urgent=0, high=1, normal=2, low=3)
'Urgente Ora' section visible with 3 urgent practices
'In Attesa di Approvazione' section visible with 1 practice
'Tutte le Pratiche' table with PRIORITA column
Badge colors verified via class names
Status badge 'Escalation' next to priority badge
